creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #14)

Just for completeness the segfault seems to be right at entry into wxbase. Upstream patched for wxWidgets 3.2.4, we have 3.2.1 in ports. If I'm reading this right there is a null pointer issue maybe? If I'm reading the about to fault 

movl 0x80(%rax), %eax

it is trying to copy memory from 0x0000000000000080 , which seems no where near the processes memory. up the disassembly %rax was a reference copy passed into it from (%rbx) right before entering the libwx_baseu  library. do not know if wx 3.2.4 will fix this when our ports has finished fixing up our dependencies on wx32 for it.

(lldb) b 0x82444A0FE
Breakpoint 3: where = libwx_baseu-3.2.so.0`libwx_baseu-3.2.so.0[0x00000000000e40fe], address = 0x000000082444a0fe
(lldb) r

* thread #1, name = 'image-compiler', stop reason = breakpoint 2.1
